text.message: I just offered wheat for sheep?
why give to green over me?
they have a way better setup
I closed my eyes and picked
yeah great work giving that trade ti green lol
i think it was their setup being clearly better that proved me correct
Blue is clearly taking army, red has road and I get robbed lmao
Blue got a few VPs or what
How is it not blue lol
Oj has no idea what’s going on
Look at how they played this whole game haha
Oj needs army or we lose fast
Probably shoulda been robbing your dev comp
green cry a little harder buddy
Buddy, you’re the one who made your decisions
i got boned with a bad position yeah
